title: Experiment
description: An A/B test: a weighted traffic split across two or more variant landing pages that share one short URL. Each visit is resolved by the experiment resolver, which assigns a variant by weight and keeps the visitor sticky via an assignment cookie. Results are per-variant views (counted at the resolver) plus conversions and revenue (attributed from orders by page_id).

control_page_id.description: The baseline page. Must also appear as one of the variants (its variant carries key 'control').

winner_page_id.description: Set when the experiment is completed; all future traffic routes here.

variants.description: The pages under test, including the control. Weights are relative; the dashboard requires them to sum to 100 before starting.

key.description: Stable variant identifier, e.g. control, variant_a.

label.description: Optional human-readable name for the dashboard.

short_code.description: The experiment's own short code; a Route with target_type 'experiment' points at it.

stats.description: Live counters maintained by the resolver. Conversions and revenue are derived from orders at read time, not stored here.

views_by_page.description: Map of page_id -> view count, incremented on each running resolve.
